titleStmt.title: SII 24.230: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 230. (A.R. No. 23 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Records the sale of garden-land by the officials of the Eḍuttakai-Aḻagiya-Nāyaṉār shrine at Tiruvaraṅgam to the bhaṭṭas of Kōdaṇḍarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam founded in the name of Perumāḷ Sundara-Pāṇḍyadēva. The inscription is dated in the (2+1st) year of the king's reign in Makara, ba. 3, Uttiram Tuesday; which details are identical with those of the previous record but for the omission in the former of the ‘opposite’ year quoted.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
komāṟupaṉmar tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī kulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 Iraṇṭāvatu Etirāmāṇṭu makara nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tritiyaiyum cev vāyk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttir(āṭa)ttu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭiyakulapati vaḷanāṭṭu veḷā nā
ṭṭu tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil nāyaṉār Eṭuttakaiyaḻakiya nāyaṉār koyil śrīvaiṣṇava kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum mutaṟ karaṇattomum tirunantavaṉa nilavilai pramāṇam . perumāḷ cuntarapāṇṭiya tevar tirunāmattāl Ivvūril vaitta Akaram kotaṇṭarāmac caturvetimaṅkalattup paṭṭarkaḷukku Iṟṟai nāḷāl viṟṟuk kuṭutta tirunantavaṉamāvatu tirukkuṟaippaṟṟil teṉṉoḻukil Innāyiṉār tiru nāmattukkāṇi Āṉa tirunantavaṉattukku Icainta kiḻpārkellai Irāmāṉucaṉ cuṟṟukkulaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai maṉṟacca viḷākattu Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟ
kellai tiruppati śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷil tirumaiyyattu śrīvaikuntanātar tirunanta vaṉattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tirumuṭikkuṟaikku perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa tiruvitikku teṟkum naṭuvuḷpaṭṭa tirunantavaṉam mikutikkuṟai Uḷpaṭa maranilaiyum viḷainilamu muḷpaṭa kiḻmel kol 10 6nya Ittirunantavaṉam kol patiṉāṟe mūṉṟu māvukkum viṟṟuk kuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa kol 1 kkum 10 7(1/2) Āka Emmi vicaiñca vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅkum nallirāci U 2 100 8 10 Ippaṇam Iru nūṟṟu Eṇpatum Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟi kaiccelavaṟa kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam
paṇṇik kuṭuttom paṭṭarkaḷukku śrīvaiṣṇavar kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum mutaṟ karaṇattomum . Ippaṭi viṟṟuk kuṭutta Ittirunantavaṉam kol patiṉāṟe muṉṟu māvil meṉokkiṉa maramum kiḻṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum bhāgamum bhāgāśra yamum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa prāptikaḷum Uṭpaṭa viṟṟukkuṭuttom Ippaṭi viṟṟuk kuṭutta(p) paṇam Irunūṟṟu Eṇpatukkum Ittirunantavaṉam kol patiṉāṟe muṉṟu māvum vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruḷ māvaṟutip poruḷ celavolai yāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ celavolai kāṭṭavum kāṇavum kaṭava tallavākavum I
ppaṭi cammatittu vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak kaik koṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom bhaṭṭakaḷukku śrīvaiṣṇavak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum mutaṟ karaṇattomum Ippaṭi viṟṟuk kuṭutta Ipramāṇappaṭi mulliyamāṉa paṇam Irunūṟṟu Eṇpatum bharatar pakkalile kaik koḷḷukaiyil Ituve krayadravyac celavu kaiyyolai yāvatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom kotaṇṭarāmac caturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku nāyaṉār Eṭuttakaiaḻakiya nāyaṉār koyil śrī vaiṣṇavak kaṇkāṇi ce
yvārkaḷum mutaṟ karaṇattomum . Ikkol patiṉāṟe muṉṟu māvukkum Ippaṇam Irunūṟṟu Eṇpatukkum malaimaṇṭala dāsan Eḻuttu § Ivarkaḷ Apekṣikka Ipramāṇam Eḻutineṉ perumākkaḷur varatarāja bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ śrīvaikuntadāsaṉeṉ §
Digital edition of SII 24.230 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
